item.title: Solution
item.description: AssumptionStrenghtAttentionAccept it for grantedShowStopperDo you think your organization/business would benefit from a platform which connects you to international universities, giving you the opportunity to collaborate on projects?My assumption is the same, however, the question here was asked qu...

item.title: Tasks
item.description: Write showstoppers if too little people liked a solution What needs to be decided Would you use it on a PC? If mixed opinion then, we have to decide.

item.title: Most suitable
item.description: Deadlines, procedures AcceleratorDeadlineWhat is neededLocation requirementsNotesTechstartsAll deadlines have passed.

item.title: Tasks
item.description: Always question everything! Result driven Search for loopholes Hristo: Make brainstorming though lean canvas How to improve? Pivot What is the problem? What makes sense? .

item.title: What to ask of everyone that I show the site to
item.description: Filll in forms.gle/4vDL6JpMRu6TzWT89 Get the contact of everyone Add in a structure list (Name - potential use) .

item.title: Erasmus university
item.description: Project Overview Project Scope Main Goal: To collaborate with companies, particularly those with interests in Southeast Asia, to define and execute specific assignments.

item.title: Dream Big, Fail often, Succeed Anyway
item.description: Mike Verhiel - Innovation manager at KPN Developed Psylaris, with a dream to let go of psychologists.
